final:
module sr_flip_flop (
    input wire S,
    input wire R,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (S && !R) begin Q <= 1 ; Qn <= 0 ; end else if (!S && R) begin Q <= 0 ; Qn <= 1 ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  // If S=0 and R=0, Q holds its state // If S=1 and R=1, Q holds its state (undefined behavior);
  end
endmodule
